_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Manufacturers determine CO₂ emissions and fuel consumption of both new heavy-duty motor vehicles and new trailers in accordance with Certification Regulations (EU) 2017/2400 and 2022/1362 respectively. CO₂ emissions and fuel consumption are simulated using the VECTO tool.
prior.source_span: Manufacturers determine CO 2 emissions and fuel consumption of both new heavy-duty motor vehicles and new trailers, in accordance with Certification Regulations (EU) 2017/2400 and 2022/1362 . CO 2 emissions and fuel consumption are simulated using the VECTO tool (please find more information below).
